preconditions: WebBLE Safari Web Extension installed from the App Store and enabled on this origin.
Peripheral advertises the standard Heart Rate service (0x180D).
Page served over HTTPS; requestDevice() invoked from a user gesture.
spec_citations: Heart Rate Measurement characteristic (0x2A37): first byte flags; bit 0 selects uint16 LE vs uint8 BPM encoding.

preconditions: WebBLE Safari Web Extension installed and enabled.
Peripheral exposes the standard Battery Service (0x180F).
Characteristic battery_level (0x2A19) is single uint8, range 0–100.
WebBLE Safari Web Extension installed and enabled.
Peripheral implements the Bluetooth SIG CGM Service (0x181F).
Production code must validate CRC and sequence numbers per the spec — discard frames that fail CRC.
spec_citations: Bluetooth SIG Continuous Glucose Monitor Service 1.0.1 (0x181F).
CGM Measurement characteristic (0x2AA7): byte 0 size, byte 1 flags, bytes 2–3 glucose concentration SFLOAT.

lock.html:
<!doctype html><html><body><button id="u">Unlock</button><script src="https://cdn.ioswebble.com/v1.js"></script><script>
const LOCK_SERVICE = '0000fee0-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb';
const LOCK_COMMAND = '0000fee1-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb';
document.getElementById('u').onclick = async () => {
  const d = await navigator.bluetooth.requestDevice({ filters: [{ services: [LOCK_SERVICE] }] });
  const s = await (await d.gatt.connect()).getPrimaryService(LOCK_SERVICE);
  const ch = await s.getCharacteristic(LOCK_COMMAND);
  await ch.writeValue(new Uint8Array([0x02 /*, ...authToken*/]));
};
</script></body></html>
preconditions: WebBLE Safari Web Extension installed and enabled.
Vendor-specific service and command-characteristic UUIDs are known.
Auth token / handshake negotiated at pairing time per vendor's integration spec.
spec_citations: Vendor-specific — consult the lock manufacturer's integration spec for the authenticated command frame.

beacon.html:
<!doctype html><html><body><button id="r">Register beacon scan</button><script src="https://cdn.ioswebble.com/v1.js"></script><script>
document.getElementById('r').onclick = async () => {
  if (!('webbleIOS' in window)) { alert('Needs WebBLE companion app'); return; }
  await window.webbleIOS.backgroundSync.registerBeaconScanning({
    filters: [{ services: ['heart_rate'] }],
    cooldownSeconds: 30,
    template: { title: 'Beacon in range', body: 'Detected {{deviceName}} at {{timestamp}}', url: location.href }
  });
};
</script></body></html>
preconditions: Feature-detect 'webbleIOS' in window — beacons are premium and iOS-only.
WebBLE companion app installed, running at least once, with notification permission granted.
template.url must be same-origin as the registering page.
spec_citations: iOS platform note: beacon delivery is optimized for quick catch-up, not guaranteed real-time while backgrounded.

peripheral-chat.html:
<!doctype html><html><body><button id="a">Advertise</button><script src="https://cdn.ioswebble.com/v1.js"></script><script>
const CHAT_SERVICE = '12345678-1234-5678-1234-56789abcdef0';
const CHAT_CHAR    = '12345678-1234-5678-1234-56789abcdef1';
document.getElementById('a').onclick = async () => {
  if (!('webbleIOS' in window)) { alert('Needs WebBLE companion app'); return; }
  await window.webbleIOS.peripheral.addService({
    uuid: CHAT_SERVICE,
    characteristics: [{ uuid: CHAT_CHAR, properties: ['read', 'write', 'notify'], value: new TextEncoder().encode('hello') }]
  });
  window.webbleIOS.peripheral.onwriterequest = ev => console.log('wrote:', new TextDecoder().decode(ev.value));
  await window.webbleIOS.peripheral.startAdvertising({ localName: 'WebBLE Chat', serviceUUIDs: [CHAT_SERVICE] });
};
</script></body></html>
preconditions: Feature-detect 'webbleIOS' in window — peripheral mode is premium and iOS-only.
WebBLE companion app installed and running.
Pick a stable custom 128-bit service/characteristic UUID pair and bake it into both sides.
spec_citations: No W3C counterpart — Web Bluetooth spec does not define GATT-server mode.
